subcodes.first_line: The Sun hath been withheld from its shining, and behind the clouds it calleth and crieth out, saying: "Praise be unto Thee, O..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الشمس منعت عن اشراقها و انها خلف السحاب تنادی و تصیح و تقول لک الحمد یا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
